programme.desc: Reaching a tipping point, Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and James (Aaron Abrams) need to vent about their growing list of grievances toward one another but avoiding disputes in front of the kids is not easy.

programme.title: Mom Wants Daughter To Marry Rich
programme.desc: Fired and pressured to marry for money, Lola pursues her dream of being an artist. She becomes a caretaker for a paralyzed man, Wes, who inspires her to live for herself. Her success in animation culminates in a shocking reunion with a recovered Wes.

programme.title: Girls Compete For Billionaire Boy
programme.desc: Ryan, pressured by his family's legacy, is forced into a superficial engagement. When his grandfather's health declines, Ryan confronts his fears and chooses to follow his heart, confessing his love for his best friend Darcy.

programme.title: Famous Celeb Falls In Love With Shy Girl
programme.desc: A famous R&B singer, Josie, obsessed with superficiality, faces a life-altering accident that causes temporary blindness. Stripped of his looks, he learns true value from Daisy, a plain but kind writer, leading him to abandon his shallow life and pursue genuine connection.

programme.title: Mom Wants Daughter To Marry For Money
programme.desc: Trapped in a shallow engagement, Mona escapes by marrying Adrian, a kind waiter. Despite family disapproval and financial struggles, they pursue their dreams - her poetry, his culinary arts - finding true love and success by embracing their authentic selves.

programme.title: Popular Girl Has Secret Crush On Nerd
programme.desc: Bentley, a high school heartbreaker, makes a bet to win over Rose, enlisting her friend Reggie's help. Reggie's growing feelings for Rose and Bentley's deceit lead to a prom-night confrontation, exposing truths and revealing true connections.

programme.title: Rich Girl Wants Friends Boyfriend
programme.desc: Spoiled Gina schemes to win back her ex, Chase, by faking a relationship with sweet Pete. Her manipulative plan backfires spectacularly, exposing her true colors and leading to public humiliation, leaving her to ponder her shallow ways.

programme.title: Opposite Siblings Swap Lives For 72 Hours
programme.desc: Nerd Freddy, overshadowed by his popular brother Tucker, wishes to trade lives. A magical snow globe grants his wish, thrusting Freddy into Tucker's cool life. He thrives, while Tucker struggles. They learn the grass isn't always greener, ultimately embracing their true selves.

programme.title: Genius Kid Sent To Military School
programme.desc: Raj, a dyslexic Indian boy, struggles in school, facing a stern father and bullies. But with a kind teacher's help, he embraces his unique talents, proving his genius through art and winning the school's talent show.

programme.title: Fastest Teen In The World
programme.desc: Orphaned Lavon, traumatized by his father's murder, falls into a life of petty crime with a dangerous friend, Mason. A compassionate track coach sees Lavon's talent and helps him heal from his past, turning his life around.

programme.title: Mean Girl Backstabs Her Friend
programme.desc: Childhood best friends Hazel and Michaela reconnect, leaving Hazel's new best friend, Laila, jealous. Laila sabotages Hazel's birthday party, only to learn Michaela secretly included her in their plans, leading to Laila confessing and the three girls reconciling.

programme.title: Man Fakes His Resume to Get Job
programme.desc: Unemployed Tim fakes a resume to become a property manager and get free rent. His deceit unravels when he fails simple maintenance tasks, leading to a building-wide flood, loss of his Bitcoin investment, and the exposure of his lies.

programme.title: Hot Girl Uses Co-Worker to Buy Her Things
programme.desc: Shallow Sabrina manipulates the nerdy, kind Zach into buying her a dress and fixing her car by leading him on with a fake date. When she stands him up for a date with her crush, Ryan, Zach transforms himself, revealing the truth to Ryan.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Jamie Morgan Kane spent 34 years in the California Prison System for a murder he claims he did not commit. Here, he tells us about his tumultuous childhood, his time serving in the Vietnam War and the series of events that led to his arrest.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former armed robber Adam Muganzi describes having a £100k bounty placed on his head by a drug kingpin, experiencing night-time police raids, and how he turned his life around after spending 10 years in prison.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Crime Scene Cleaner Ben Giles talks about how he set up his own Crime Scene Cleaning business in the early 2000s. He tells us the most disgusting thing he's ever seen and explains why he does a job that 99% of people couldn't stomach.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we speak to adventurer Darren Edwards who narrowly escaped death after a terrifying fall from a 200ft high cliff. The impact of the accident left Darren with life-changing injuries, aged just 26. Darren's inspirational story recounts the power of true friendship, the harrowing obstacles he overcame, and the impact of losing his father.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Alex South gives us an fascinating insight into life inside the UK's toughest high-security prisons, revealing the creative ways prisoners hide drugs and phones and make homemade weapons and what finally led her to leave the prison service.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Carlos ‘Carlitos' Páez Rodriguez, a survivor of the 1972 Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571 plane crash in the Andes, discusses the plane crashing at an altitude of 11,170 feet and the resulting 72 days surviving extreme cold, avalanches and starvation.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Baz Hulse, who was jailed for 10 years in a prison in India for smuggling diazepam tablets, tells us about his life inside prison, the culture shock he experienced and the mental strength he needed to push through.

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father's death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: Guddan
programme.desc: Guddan, a cheerful yet clumsy young woman, ends up marrying Akshat Jindal aka AJ, a rich businessman with three sons and daughters-in-law. How will Guddan face the challenges that await her?

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Gangaaa
programme.desc: Gangaa, a child widow, faces numerous hardships while living in a community of ultra-conservative people. However, with a blend of charm and bravery, she challenges outdated traditions.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: King of Hearts

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.10
programme.desc: Seong Jae suggests that Joon Young talks about his family on TV for publicity. Joon Young feels both insulted and ashamed, but he holds his ground. Meanwhile, Song Ah asks Joon Young if she can visit his place. She keeps feeling Jun Kyung's presence around Joon Young both at his apartment and later on at school.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.11
programme.desc: Seong Jae finds out that Song Ah and Joon Young are dating and calls her for a chat. His bluntness hurts her feelings. Later on, Joon Young joins Song Ah on a sudden trip to Daejeon and shows her around the neighborhood where he grew up. After an unexpected meeting with his mother, Joon Young opens up to Song Ah about more personal matters.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.12
programme.desc: Song Ah has to look for a new accompanist when her last one quits. She asks her acquaintances for help, but she has no luck. Just then, Joon Young offers to play for her. People find out that Song Ah and Joon Young are dating and that Joon Young is playing for Song Ah's grad school exam. Rumors about them spread like wildfire, which makes Song Ah doubt if she made the right decision. Meanwhile, Joon Young looks for paid work performing at a concert.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.13
programme.desc: With Jung Kyung constantly asking Joon Young whether he still has feelings for her, Joon Young once again tells her how he feels. Later, Song Ah questions Joon Young about his whereabouts last night after seeing him and Jung Kyung ride off in a taxi. When Director Nah asks Joon Young a favor regarding Jung Kyung, he turns down her request. Meanwhile, Song Ah is going through a hard time herself and makes a decision that should've been made a long time ago.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.14
programme.desc: The recording of Yoo Tae Jin playing "Traumerei" goes viral. However, it turns out that Joon Young performed the music, not Tae Jin. He demands Tae Jin take the recording down, but he refuses. Jung Kyung helps Joon Young by successfully convincing Tae Jin to take the recording down. Song Ah runs into Jung Kyung and hears about the recording and how much it means to Joon Young. In the end, she decides to break up with Joon Young.

programme.title: Do You Like Brahms? Ep.15
programme.desc: After breaking up with Joon Young, Song Ah continues with her entrance exam as if nothing happened. On the other hand, Joon Young feels very bad that he hurt Song Ah. In spite of the dissuasion, Joon Young decides to quit playing the piano. Meanwhile, Director Nah passes away. At the funeral, when Song Ah tells Joon Young about her recital and her plans as a violinist, Joon Young asks her if he can be her accompanist.

programme.title: Sporting Heroes

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Sandstorm: “… darkness that can be felt … covered all Egypt for three days,” reports the Bible. “No one could see anyone else … for three days.” (Exodus 10:22–23). Dust storms frequently paralyze public life during the storm season in many of the most arid regions of the Earth, burying roads and human settlements, threatening the lives of humans and animals alike.

programme.title: Children of the Wild
programme.desc: In many cultures there are myths about “wolf children” who were taken from their families and then grew up in the wild, either alone or with wolves, bears or other animals. But how close are such stories to reality? This program offers a combination of two stories: the true story of the monkey boy John Ssebunya in Uganda, and that of Rudyard Kipling's Mowgli, the most famous, albeit fictitious, wolf child of all. Unlike the children in the myths and stories, children who grow up without human beings have massive problems integrating themselves into society. The program specifically follows the fate of the young Ugandan boy John Ssebunya. If there is no human being as communication partner in the first years of a child's life, the wolf child will yelp, growl, scream or grunt. He is not yet ready to make contact with other children.

programme.title: In Search of Santa Claus
programme.desc: The amazing transformation of a holy man from Turkey into the world-wide symbol of Christmas cheer. He's one of the most widely recognized figures in the world but what are the origins of St. Nicholas, and how did he become Santa Claus? With criminological acumen, this one-hour documentary sorts the myths from the facts to present the true story of the first multi-national saint, revered by the Catholic, Protestant and Orthodox churches alike.

programme.title: The Secret of the Phaistos Code
programme.desc: Is the Phaistos Disc a clever fake? The film follows the trail of possibly one of the greatest archaeological scandals ever. The search for the truth starts in the ancient Cretan palace complexes of Phaistos. The North American art dealer Jerome Eisenberg, one of the world's foremost forgery experts, considers the “Phaistos Disc” to be a latter-day fake. In 1908, it was discovered by the Italian archaeologist Luigi Pernier. Since then, the disc has aroused the scientific ambition of countless linguists. The British academic Gareth Owens has analyzed new archaeological discoveries with unfamiliar characters and believes the disc to be genuine. But Eisenberg remains convinced that the disc cannot be deciphered at all. He claims that not only does it not reveal a text that has ever been decipherable, but also that is not even of ancient origin.

programme.title: The Advance of the Hanseatic League
programme.desc: At the bottom of the Baltic Sea lies a cog, a relic of the might of the German Hanse, a league of merchantmen founded about 1200 AD. Archaeologists are retracing its final voyage using state of the art technology as well as ancient scripts. Their search takes them to the Norwegian port of Bergen, to the Shetlands and even as far as Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition in the South Seas
programme.desc: He is one of the greatest German explorers of all time even though his name fell into oblivion: As luck would have it, in 1772 17-year-old Georg Forster was given the chance to accompany the greatest navigator of his time, James Cook, on his world circumnavigation. On this voyage, Captain Cook discovered islands and peoples, while Georg Forster focused on animals and plants, discovering more than 400 species that had been unknown to Europeans until then. “Terra X” follows German actor Robert Atzorn on his search for traces around the world. He gets to know a young man, whose philosophy and conception of the world still appear to be really modern. Sophisticated dramatic reconstructions bring the fateful sea journey to life. The film portrays a great natural scientist whose knowledge and legacy determined patterns for scientific research in the 21st century.

programme.title: The Deadly Treasure of Lake Kivu
programme.desc: In Lake Kivu, on the borders of Rwanda and Congo, there is methane gas worth $25 billion. Enough to supply central Africa's energy needs for generations. But if it explodes, it will kill up to two and a half million people living on Lake Kivu's shores. The danger is real.

programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Roxanne let her puppy case, ‘Ripple' stay overnight at the dorm. The group – especially her roommate Charlotte - is critical of this. Not only is she using the dog as a social crutch, it's highly unprofessional to become so attached to a patient.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg forces the students to attend a local Heritage Festival – something none of them are in the mood for on their ‘day off'. But will their attitudes change after witnessing the South African dance and folk customs?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Hosted by Rhino Safari Camp, the epic safari continues back in the Matusadona National Park where Kristina is guided by Steve. They explore the lake-shore, encounter the hungry local pride and Marula, the resident elephant, makes a lunch-time appearance.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to Gonarezhou National Park in the South-East of Zimbabwe. Thomas, her guide, takes her to the breath-taking Chilojo cliffs, tracks an impressive buffalo herd and keeps his cool as they experience heart-stopping elephant charges. Will Kristina finally spot her dream leopard?

programme.title: The World From Above
programme.desc: Looking down on our world from above, we might see the incredible diversity of landscapes, the opportunities for wildlife and gain an understanding of the interconnectedness of all life.

programme.title: Antelope
programme.desc: For some the word ‘antelope' might not incite much interest but look closer and you'll discover a remarkably diverse group of animals, numbering nearly one hundred different species. Some are easy to miss, the little dik-dik being barely the size of a house cat, while eland weigh in at more than half a ton. There are representatives roaming plains from the Mongolian Plateau in Asia to the cape of South Africa. Wherever you find them, these remarkable animals are the unsung heroes of the plains.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: Nestled alongside Canada's south west coast, Vancouver Island is home to the richest Pacific wildlife.

programme.desc: The Falkland Islands' pristine coastlines and bountiful seas offer a lifeline and breeding centre for millions of penguins each year.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Discover Poland
programme.desc: The world‘s best helicopter camera system - the Cineflex Camera - was used for this documentary and delivered fantastic images in HD quality, revealing the surprisingly diverse landscapes and fascinating towns of Poland from a bird‘s eye view of Poland‘s medieval towns, the modern silhouette of Warsaw, the untouched nature of the border regions between east and west, the coasts to the north and the mountain ranges of the south

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Wismar Bay is unique in its diversity on the Mecklenburg Baltic Sea coast: cliffs, sandy beaches, salt marshes, enchanted islands and, last but not least, the proud Hanseatic city of Wismar with its brick Gothic buildings, which are a UNESCO World Heritage Site. When the mighty logs get wedged together in the timber mill in the port of Wismar, Steven Buchholz has to get to work with his chainsaw. It's a dangerous job, because the logs weigh tons. As a trained carpenter, Steven is a virtuoso with the chain saw. Even after his shift is over, he is looking for the thrill: the wind off his home island of Poel is favorable that day and he wants to reclaim the German record in the kite surfing high jump. For a long time, Ramona Stelzer only knew fish as a tasty ingredient between two halves of a bun. But when the goldsmith got her hands on fish leather, her business idea was born: she processes the unique natural product fish skin into fine jewelry. The problem is that hardly anyone in Germany tans fish skin. In order to reliably obtain supplies, Ramona now wants to learn this craft herself.

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, the horrifying murder of Archbishop Thomas Becket of Canterbury led thousands of pilgrims to the south of England. Centuries later, the long-forgotten Pilgrims' Way is now enjoying a revival. The Pilgrims Way leads east to west cross-country from Winchester to Canterbury through the counties of Hampshire, Surrey and Kent.

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.desc: In honour of the Archangel Michael, thousands of medieval Christians set off on pilgrimages to the famous mountain monastery of the Mont-Saint-Michel in the Atlantic Ocean. Today it continues to enchant millions of visitors each year. But the pilgrimage route from Rouen to the mountain abbey seems to have been forgotten: it leads through the depths of Normandy into rural France.

programme.title: Europe`s Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.desc: For centuries, pilgrims have set off on the Via Francigena in the hopes of reaching the tombs of the apostles Peter and Paul in Rome. The ancient pilgrimage route leads through the imposing Alps to the Great St Bernard Pass and from there cross-country through Italy.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: The Sulcis Archipelago is located off the south-western coast of Sardinia and is part of the province of of southern Sardinia. The islands of San Pietro, Sant'Antioco and Isola Piana form the archipelago, together with several uninhabited islets and rocks form the archipelago. It belongs to the less known areas in Italy and is little developed for tourism. Nevertheless stars like Tom Cruise and Roberto Cavalli come here to enjoy the peace, seclusion and good food. The islanders are only moderately interested in these visitors, and their down-to-earth attitude has never lost.

programme.title: Italy's Uncharted Islands
programme.desc: Lake Iseo is located on the southern foothills of the Alps. It extends over the provinces of Brescia and Bergamo in the northern mainland of Italy. In the middle of Lake Iseo lies the largest island of the southern European inland waters. Monte Isola, as the island is called after its central mountain lies close to its two neighboring islands, Isola di San Paolo and Isola di Loreto. As early as the 11th century, a monastic association of Benedictines settled here. For many Italians, Lake Iseo is the most beautiful spot in their homeland. It is all the more astonishing how little the influence of tourism is here. Driving is strictly forbidden on the three islands, and only on Monte Isola. Only on Monte Isola there is a regular bus service in the summertime. Thus, the three islands are an oasis of an oasis of tranquility most of the year. The historical buildings and the nature remind of the long tradition in which the Italians have cultivated this retreat. Only every five years in the autumn a big celebration takes place. Then over 200,000 paper flowers decorate the island. The flowers are reminiscent of the time in the Middle Ages when a Roma woman brought her son to the island to be cured from the from the rampant plague. In gratitude, she donated a sea of flowers. The Festa di Santa Croce has been one of the main attractions in northern Italy ever since. The days are radiant with color, it is the only time when it gets crowded in the small streets of the island villages. The next festival was celebrated in September 2021.

programme.title: Europe's Forgotten Pilgrim Routes
programme.desc: For centuries, pilgrims have set off on the Via Francigena in the hopes of reaching the tombs of the apostles Peter and Paul in Rome. The ancient pilgrimage route leads through the imposing Alps to the Great St Bernard Pass and from there cross-country through Italy: along the Aosta Valley and the endless rice fields of the Po Valley, over the mountains of the Apennines, and the rolling hills of Tuscany to Lazio – en route, modern pilgrims discover Italy's majestic and diverse landscapes, as well as traces of bygone eras. Along the way, they meet people who share with them their enthusiasm for the country and the tradition of pilgrimage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression. 'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop. The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.” “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, "The Littlest Berrykin," into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the "retrieve" part of the activity-as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play, a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park.

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Rival: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Bewitching Friendship: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Little Big Smurf: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Astrosmurf: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Put Upon Puppy: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Where The Wild Smurfs Are: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He'd be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha's dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Word: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: SUMMER
programme.desc: The Rabbids enjoy summer through chaotic adventures full of noise, sun, and silliness.

programme.title: EASTER
programme.desc: The Rabbids hunt for Easter eggs with spectacularly ridiculous and messy results.

programme.title: VALENTINESDAY
programme.desc: The Rabbids try to celebrate Valentine's Day, creating a whirlwind of chaotic affection.

programme.title: SPORT
programme.desc: The Rabbids dive chaotically into sports, turning every game into total mayhem.

programme.title: FETE_DE_LA_MUSIQUE
programme.desc: The Rabbids celebrate Music Day by creating the loudest and wildest concert ever.

programme.title: WINTER
programme.desc: The Rabbids explore winter and Christmas in their own messy and hilarious way.

programme.title: HALLOWEEN
programme.desc: The Rabbids celebrate Halloween with spooky antics and completely ridiculous scares.

programme.title: Pasta la Vista
programme.desc: Who is the best cook in all the forest? Masha has no doubts as to how to correctly answer this question. And the proof is right before you: macaroni cooked by Masha herself. What can be simpler? Only Dasha is somehow sure that Masha's final product is inedible. As usual, Bear will have to solve the girls' dispute, as usual.

programme.title: New Kids on the Block!
programme.desc: Masha enthusiastically plays with her "dolls", but Rosie wants to be independent. She trades places with wolves and now they are under Masha's care. Rosie enjoys adult life, but everything is not that simple ...

programme.title: Surprise! Surprise!
programme.desc: The wolves come up with a new idea how to get a stable and nutritious food source… they rob a poultry farm and get a…rooster. Meanwhile Masha and the hare arrange a real egg hunt for all their friends and neighbours! All forest dwellers are very excited to get chocolate eggs except for the wolves who long for some real food… Masha decides to help poor guys and arranges a splendid dinner!

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: Hold Your Breath
programme.desc: Bright summer day. Bear, while gathering berries, meets female bear in the forest and arranges a date with her. Returning home, he starts cleaning the house and baking a pie. Once the pie is done, the Bear decorates it with strawberries. Masha eats them before starting to hiccup. The Bear tries all manner of remedies from a medical encyclo-pedia to stop the hiccups. In the end, hiccups spread to everyone including all other forest in-habitants.

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: Mushroom Rain
programme.desc: Autumn forest is so wonderful. You can pick mushrooms, listen to birds singing ... But what if there are absolutely no mushrooms at all? Masha finds an original solution to this problem. Which one? Watch the episode and find out!

programme.title: Driving Lessons
programme.desc: Who wants to pimp a car? Then hurry up to stand in a queue! Why? Because in a new, 55th episode there are loads of unexpected things that happened in the forest: Masha appears as a first-rate mechanic , wolves who, obviously, decided to change their occupation appear as taxi drivers ... okay, okay… we should stop throwing spoilers around…watch everything yourself!

programme.title: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: A van with Monkeys arrived at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction - a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize. But things didn't go according to plan. And now the main strongman of the forest cannot do without the help of his friends.

programme.title: Happy Harvest
programme.desc: Can you imagine Masha as a magical fairy? What magic could she create? Of course something enchanting and fantastic! Especially when the Bear decided to cheer the Female Bear and organize a masquerade ball! Masha put all her efforts to create a bright, memorable and very harvest party, but this magic evening couldn't survive without Masha's tricks…

programme.title: One-Hit Wonder
programme.desc: Masha decides to help the Bear to win the heart of his beloved Female Bear. To do so, Masha organizes her own rock band and shoots a music video. The hare plays on drums, the wolves play on piano and Masha rocks out on a guitar! This is something that the forest inhabitants have never seen before.

programme.title: Jam Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to harvest berries and to cook jam. This idea is literally up to Masha's taste. She tries everything. Afterwards she decides to play an astronaut by putting a glass jar on her head. The Bear tries to get her head out of the container and eventually he succeeds only to discover his own paw inside the same jar. He spends the remaining day in attempts to free his hand.

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: God save the queen
programme.desc: Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule.

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Troubled Story About Baba-Yaga
programme.desc: A boy called Pasha was afraid of fairytale villains. He had read so many fairy tales that it got him really scared! Any trouble he faced was shifted to all kind of evil spirits… like Baba-Yaga. Only the courageous firefighters could assure Pasha that Baba-Yaga is not the reason for his troubles at all!

programme.title: Terrible Truth About Those Who Are Afraid To Be Little
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Grim Parable About Superstitious Girl
programme.desc: Some people happen to believe in all sorts of omens like black cats, wearing clothes inside out, prophetic dreams… Poor girl Lucy believed in that kind of stuff so much that was even afraid to go outside to play with her friends. And how could you go out if you were born in the year of Purple rabbit that promises…no matter what… You'll see…

programme.title: Terrible Legend About Thunder And Lightning
programme.desc: Masha tells an existing story about thunder and lighting and what might happen if the lighting suddenly catches you in the park…while you are enjoying your orange lemonade?

programme.title: God save the queen
programme.desc: Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode.Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule.

programme.title: My Cutie-Patootie
programme.desc: Masha wanted to get a pet - a hedgehog. But the hedgehog didn't want to be a pet and started to run away. What a stubborn hedgehog. But Masha is even more stubborn. He runs, she catches him. He runs again, she catches him again. And so in a circle, until she finally found in her house... a surprise! Watch the episode and see for yourself!

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: The Grand Piano Lesson
programme.desc: The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. He happily takes it home, fixes and tunes it and begins to play some music. Masha couldn't help staying away from this lovely instrument. She decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano.

programme.title: The First Swallow
programme.desc: Do you know what ornithology is? This is a science that studies birds! Andit is also Dasha's new hobby. She comes to visit Masha and the Bear and discovers a new unique bird species! What is this amazing unusual bird? Hurry up and watch this new episode to find out!

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: The Bear mixes up in a very nasty gambling story! He is ready to spend all day long playing all kinds of computer games. He quit housekeeping, multiple hobbies and friends. It seems that the game is over, but Masha runs to help her best friend at the very last moment!

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Happy Harvest
programme.desc: Can you imagine Masha as a magical fairy? What magic could she create? Of course something enchanting and fantastic! Especially when the Bear decided to cheer the Female Bear and organize a masquerade ball! Masha put all her efforts to create a bright, memorable and very harvest party, but this magic evening couldn't survive without Masha's tricks…

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: Get Well Soon!
programme.desc: Tired from Masha's endless games, the Bear pre-tends to be sick so the little girl would leave him alone. But the caring girl sets to cure her friend. After a series of failed attempts, she finally man-ages to cure the Bear.

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: Driving Lessons
programme.desc: Who wants to pimp a car? Then hurry up to stand in a queue! Why? Because in a new, 55th episode there are loads of unexpected things that happened in the forest: Masha appears as a first-rate mechanic , wolves who, obviously, decided to change their occupation appear as taxi drivers ... okay, okay… we should stop throwing spoilers around…watch everything yourself!

programme.title: Masha Knows Best
programme.desc: Masha is sure that she is the best nanny in the world because all children simply adore her! Could this actually be true?

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: What a wonderful game
programme.desc: Hockey is a game for the most courageous, strong and dexterous! All you need is a united experienced team and a talented coach, who can lead them to victory. But where can one find such a team? Watch the episode and find out!

programme.title: Fishy story
programme.desc: Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However, everything is not so simple in our story. The Bear didn't even suspect what kind of adventure he was going to find on his fishing trip. While Masha and She-Bear frightened by his sudden disappearance, explore the neighborhood, he ... however, you will find out everything yourself in our new episode.

programme.title: Springtime For Bear
programme.desc: The Bear wakes up with the arrival of spring. While running around the forest, he stumbles upon a beautiful female bear. He quickly falls in love. He grabs some flowers and chocolates and rushes to her hoping to invite her for a date. Of course, Masha ruins all of his plans. The Bear does his best to get rid of the girl disturbs their idyll. Finally the female Bear notices her and demands an explanation. He tries to explain but faces with a choice –Masha or the female Bear. The Bear can't make up his mind at once and the Female Bear goes away with another bear.

programme.title: Hat Trick
programme.desc: The Bear is desperately struggling against the greedy moth, which appeared in his house. Trying to save his magic box, he puts it on the porch, and Masha finds the magic hat that can make her invisible ...

programme.title: Stripes And Whiskers
programme.desc: The Circus Tiger visits his old friend Bear. The whiskered and stripped cat is utterly bewildered by Masha's behavior and tries everything to get rid of her. Nevertheless his changes his mind when he gets lost in the forest and Masha saves in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Spanish Tunes
programme.desc: The bear is ready for anything to please Masha and She-Bear, even to become a mysterious and unpredictable Spaniard for a day. They travel to an amazing and hospitable country, where passions are seething to the sounds of the guitar and the clicking of a castanets.

programme.title: Practice in Childhood
programme.desc: Tired of traditional music lessons, Masha dreams of performing without the tedious practice. She sets off on an adventure through a fairytale version of Germany, meeting charming animal musicians along the way. Together, they discover the joy of music, friendship, and the magic that happens when you follow your passion.

programme.title: From England with Love
programme.desc: A new lovely friend from foggy England got lost in the forest. Masha acts like a real Robin Hood. She wants to help this lost soul to return home. Meanwhile, the eternally hungry Wolves are trying to get to our guest.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Professor Von Schlemmer (from Too Tall Tails) has created a machine which brings dreams to life. When Robotnik hears about it, he forces the Professor to alter the machine so that nightmares come to life.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them, Nagus pretends to be the King so Sonic will use his speed to transport him outside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part I
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country The Curse of Kongo Bongo

programme.desc: The competition grows and the gamers meet their 7th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the players get lost in this hectic hedge maze.

programme.desc: Krusha gets highly intelligent after being run over by a minecart and turns into the leader of the Kremlings. When Diddy and Dixie are trapped in a runaway mine cart with no brakes, it's up to Donkey Kong and Candy to rescue them.

programme.title: SONIC X EP-7 Party Hardly

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Sweet Escape
programme.desc: The competition is down to the final four! Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers run through this sugary sweet obstacle course for the chance to become the ultimate gamer.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Dune Dash

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country. Donkey Kong Country
programme.desc: Donkey Kong Country

programme.desc: After Eggman discovers that he is being watched by the military he sends E-90 to swallow the satellite, but this disrupts everyone's TVs! So Chuck and Tails decide to upgrade the Tornado into X-Tornado, allowing Sonic to enter high altitude in order to destroy E-90.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Rainbow Rumble

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Donkey Kong Country

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Leaping Lava
programme.desc: Things heat up in the fourth challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches the kids leap over the dangerous lava pits for a chance to become the ultimate gamer.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Zap Attack
programme.desc: The competition zaps into the 5th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers test their memory in this electrifying memory puzzle.

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country The Curse of Kongo Bongo
programme.desc: Everyone in the island receives a mysterious letter. Donkey Kong and Diddy discovers that Kongo Bongo Island is coming to an end which these letters contain a curse that causes the Crystal Coconut to stop working, and could eventually destroy the island.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes help a young girl care for the Mareep at her family's farm.

programme.title: Pokémon
