programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash finds a wild Cyndaquil, he's eager to catch it—but he's not alone.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Azalea Town, Ash carelessly provokes its residents who adore Slowpoke.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash finally delivers the mysterious GS Ball to a renowned Poké Ball expert.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash gives his all to take on Bugsy's Pokémon at the Azalea Town Gym.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes help a boy whose Farfetch'd doesn't respect him as a Trainer.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Team Rocket gets more than they bargained for at an event for trading Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash's Squirtle reunites with its former squad at firefighting competition.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes come across a preschool for Wooper, but Team Rocket's up to no good.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and friends get caught up in a feud between Jigglypuff and Snubbull.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes try to earn the trust of Houndour struggling to survive in the wild.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash and Misty's rivalry is reignited when they both try to catch a Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After encountering a fearsome Trainer, Ash and Cyndaquil train to get stronger.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Ash's Totodile develops a crush on an Azumarill that stars in a Pokémon circus.

programme.title: Love On The Rise
programme.desc: A baker mistakes a wealthy bachelor for a waiter and the two quickly fall in love, not realizing his company is trying to evict her bakery. Starring Katrina Norman (2020)

programme.title: Love on Trend
programme.desc: (2021) Stylish romantic comedy starring Jocelyn Panton. When a small-town designer is given a famous fashionista's phone number, she enters a world of haut couture - and unforeseen love.

programme.title: Diagnosis Delicious
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Maya Stojan. A fallen chef and a talented cardiologist who hates cooking cross paths in a cooking class-serving up a lesson in love neither saw coming.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: A mechanic and her father compete with a rival repair shop to keep their shop afloat. Starring Katherine Barrell (2024)

programme.title: Love In Design
programme.desc: Hannah returns to her hometown to renovate a house for her TV show. But will she find herself falling for the charms of her hometown and her ex-boyfriend all over again? Danica McKellar stars. (2018)

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: Former CIA spy takes on his toughest assignment to date: looking after his girlfriend's three kids.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E6 Here Comes the Sun - The spies investigate a former beach bunny beauty queen who devises a device which selectively intensifies the sun's rays on certain parts of the world – thereby, subjecting those people to severe heat and sun. The villain then sells her 2000 SPF sun block to those affected.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E7 Green With N.V - When men all over the world abruptly and unexpectedly leave their wives, the spies are called-in to investigate. What they discover is Possession, a new French perfume created by Natalie Valentine. The perfume's secret ingredient? Natalie Valentine's pheromones.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.sub-title: S2:E8 Boys Bands Will be Boys Bands
programme.desc: S2:E8 Boys Bands Will be Boys Bands - The Spies investigate the hottest new pop band, Teensicle, when several band members begin to mysteriously disappear. When the band members resurface seemingly safe and sound, the spies detect strange changes in their personalities.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E9 I, Dude - When tsunamis begin to wipe out tourist spots/resort areas all over the world, WOOHP sends in the spies. What they discover is that the tsunamis are man made – an evil plot by ex-surfer Frankie Dude to restore the beaches to their natural state and original “surfability.”

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E10 Mommies Dearest - It's Mother's Day and the spies decide to take their moms to an exclusive spa to celebrate. Once they get there, however, the girls notice that their moms have begun to act quite strangely. In fact, it quickly becomes apparent to the spies that their moms are trying to kill them!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E11 Zooney World - When the children of the world start to disappear, the spies uncover a sinister television show and a host who is training the children to take over the adult world. In a b-story, Clover somehow has to complete her mission while being grounded to her bedroom.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E12 First Brat - The girls are assigned babysitting duty at the White House for the President's 11-year-old daughter, Madison. At first Madison seems to be a perfect angel, but, as soon as her dad is out of sight, she turns into a major brat.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E13 W.O.W - Ariel is the leader of W.O.W. – “Women of Wrestling”, a vicious wrestling troop made up of a race of ancient, deadly, tall, and strong warriors!

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: S2:E14 Stark Raving Mad - The spies' old nemesis, Mr. Sebastian, is holding extreme underground raves in Beverly Hills. At the raves, his specially engineered music is inciting the ravers to destroy whatever venue they are having the rave in or at.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie's youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Ghosthunters: On Icy Trails
programme.desc: When the often-fearful eleven-year-old Tom discovers a slimy green ghost in his cellar called Hugo, he is understandably afraid. However, Tom soon realises that Hugo, who is an ASG (Averagely Spooky Ghost), is not only completely harmless but also desperately in need of his help.

programme.title: Gone Daughter Gone
programme.desc: (2020) Suspenseful thriller starring Andrea Bogart. When her daughter is abducted, Shannon decides to take matters into her own hands, putting her on a collision course with a deadly kidnapper...

programme.title: Dating to Kill
programme.desc: (2019) Cradle-robbing thriller with Clare Kramer. Jessica is shocked when her daughter starts dating an older man. But that soon turns to terror when she discovers her lethal connection to him...

programme.title: Crisis Point
programme.desc: (2012) Thriller with Rhona Mitra. Still haunted by a failed negotiation, a psychologist is thrust back into high-stakes action when her sister is taken hostage, forcing her to face her greatest fears.

programme.title: Lone Rider
programme.desc: (2008) Gutsy western starring Lou Diamond Phillips. A decorated soldier returning home after the American Civil War finds that an evil land owner has taken over the town.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: A divorced father and his eight-year-old son, spend a rather predictable weekend together, but when a valuable toolbox gets stolen, the search for the thieves will turn into a true family bonding.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Everything is running smoothly for popular radio DJ Dr. Emma Lloyd in the run up to her own wedding when she makes the shocking discovery: she's already married – and to someone else!

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: Semasa Perang Dunia Kedua, perompak bank yang dihukum Eddie Chapman menjadi agen tiga kali yang bekerja untuk British dan Jerman.

programme.title: The Archer
programme.desc: Imprisoned in a reform camp Lauren befriends Rebecca and together they manage to escape its unsafe environs into the wilds of Utah where they must fight for their lives.

programme.title: Twist Of Fate
programme.desc: Grieving over the untimely loss of his family and in a dissociative state, an aimlessly-wandering Jewish man is rescued by another family who help him find his way back to happiness again.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that's a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: Dreamin Wild
programme.desc: What if a childhood dream suddenly came true - but thirty years later? That's what happened to singer/songwriter Donnie Emerson. His dream of success suddenly – and unexpectedly – came true but only as he approached 50 years old.

programme.title: Cyclops
programme.desc: When a terrifying Cyclops is terrorizing the Roman countryside the emperor sends in his strongest general.

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Robbie and his three college classmates decide to move their board game into the local legendary cavern.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the charming city of York, and after the death of her mother, teenager Jules knows all she and her dad, David, really need for Christmas is love. With both struggling to cope with everyday life in the shadow of their loss, Jules, inspired by happy memories of her mum, decides to take matters into her own hands. Creating profiles for David on multiple online dating platforms without his knowledge, Jules sets out to find her dad a girlfriend and, for herself, someone with whom she can talk. But finding love is easier said than done as Jules discovers, when her plans begin to unravel with hilarious and unexpected consequences. A uniquely heartfelt festive rom-com, starring Jermey Piven (Serendipity, Entourage) and Joely Richardson (101 Dalmatians, The Patriot).

programme.title: 12 Days Of Giving
programme.desc: When Baxter Billings (David Blue - SGU Stargate Universe, Ugly Betty) wins a small fortune at his local shopping mall, he decides to become a Secret Santa to the people in his hometown. His anonymous philanthropy is contagious and soon enough the joy of giving at Christmas spreads across town. Along the way, Baxter forms a close friendship with Pamela (Ashley Jones - True Blood, The Bold and the Beautiful) and her young son Westin. He thinks he might be falling for Pamela... but there's one problem, he's already engaged! This Christmas, Baxter will have to choose between keeping promises or following his heart.

programme.title: The Way
programme.desc: Martin Sheen plays Tom, an American doctor who comes to France to collect the remains of his adult son who was killed in the Pyrenees in a storm while walking The Camino de Santiago - also known as 'The Way of Saint James'. Driven by his desire to understand his lost son, Tom decides to embark on the historical pilgrimage, leaving his California life behind. Armed only with his son's backpack and guidebook, he begins the 800km historical pilgrimage but soon discovers that he won't be alone on this journey - he meets other pilgrims from around the world, all broken and looking for greater meaning in their lives. From the hardship experienced along "The Way" an unlikely group of misfits are bonded and Tom begins to learn the difference between 'The life we live and the life we choose.'

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: A Call to Spy
programme.desc: Inspired by incredible true stories. At the beginning of WWII Churchill orders his new spy agency to recruit women as spies to build a resistance. SOEs spymistress Vera Atkins (Stana Katic), recruits Virginia Hall (Sarah Megan Thomas), an ambitious American with a wooden leg and Noor Inayat Khan (Radhika Apte), a Muslim pacifist, who leave an unmistakable legacy in their wake.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: Jumanji meets The Mummy in this edge-of-your-seat action thriller, starring Kelsey Grammer (X-Men), Kellan Lutz (Twilight) and Bingbing Li (Transformers). In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, battling Chinese magic and flesh-eating spiders, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Entanglement
programme.desc: A charmingly quirky romantic comedy with a twist! While searching for the meaning of his existence, Ben Layton (Thomas Middleditch: Silicon Valley) uncovers a family secret that leads him to a woman named Hanna (Jess Weixler: The Good Wife) who might have almost been his adopted sister. But when he and Hanna inadvertently fall in love, his life becomes increasingly and weirdly complicated. Epic!

programme.title: The Last Witness
programme.desc: BAFTA Award Nominee Piotr Szkopiak directs this unmissable political thriller, based on the harrowing true events of the Katyn Massacre in Spring 1940. While investigating a spate of suicides by resettled Polish soldiers, ambitious journalist Stephen (Alex Pettyfer) is embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy concerning the execution of 22,000 Polish military and civilians by Stalin's secret police.

programme.title: Just for the Summer
programme.desc: Teacher Penelope Campbell loves visiting her Grandma Dot every summer – despite her constant attempts to find Penelope a man! This year, she bumps into her childhood sweetheart Jason Humphrey, who explains his grandmother is desperate to pair him off, too.

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: A self-absorbed realtor enlists the help of his neighbor when he's suddenly left in charge of the granddaughter he never knew existed until his estranged son drops her off at his home.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Fulfillment
programme.desc: When a couple wants a baby but the husband cannot produce one, he calls his brother, hoping he will oblige and his wife will agree.

programme.title: Before You Say I Do
programme.desc: George wants to marry Jane, but she swore off marriage after her first husband broke her heart. After wishing he had met Jane before she got married, George winds up ten years in the past.

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: What seems to be a chance encounter one day at a coffee shop leads to a full-fledged romance, but the couple must fight for their relationship to survive the craziness that is show business. Starring: Meghan Markle, Sean Young, Michael Rady

programme.title: Love on the Side
programme.desc: A small-town waitress vies with a sassy city slicker for the attention of the town's most eligible bachelor.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Love by Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip with her godmother, a woman enlists her mechanic to be her fake boyfriend, but soon their fake relationship isn't so fake after all.

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Next Door Nightmare
programme.desc: Sarah and Kyle move next door to a charismatic, but deeply disturbed psychopath.

programme.title: Darren and Chastity / Ryan / Julie
programme.desc: A family is subjected to a vicious attack during a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Til Ex Do Us Part
programme.desc: As Kyle and Sophia reconnect, she's accused of assaulting his friend Claire, a woman he slept with once.

programme.title: Wish You Were Dead
programme.desc: Hayley Udall tries to make ends meet for herself and her 14 year-old daughter while providing alimony for a horrible ex-husband. She wishes her problems with her ex could go away, and upon venting her frustrations one night, finds herself tangled up in a pact with two people (Melanie and Kevin) to “eliminate” each other's problems.

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: A Lethal Lesson
programme.desc: High school teacher Lauren is accused of an affair by a student, putting her job and life in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poet with an abusive husband reaches out to a fan for help, only to find an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The Indians are now a World Series contender. But last year's hunger is now replaced with complacency, and bad decisions by the new owner threaten to tear the team apart.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: Bill Murray and Harold Ramis as bootcamp flatfoots who join the Army to meet girls and actually succeed. Mud wrestling will never be the same.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G.W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows
programme.desc: Feared bounty hunter Lazar arrives in a gold-mining town to blackmail ex-bandit Barrett, now a ruthless mine owner. Followed by a young gunfighter with his own motive, Lazar forges an uneasy alliance. But as tensions rise, it becomes clear that not everyone is after gold—some seek justice, others revenge.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: Django... Adios!
programme.desc: Django, a former federal sheriff, is arrested for allegedly stealing a chest full of dollars that was earmarked for the construction of a school and church in Silver City.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts.

programme.title: THE SECRET PLACE
programme.desc: When a temperamental opera star finds out her husband is accused of murder she sets off to find the real killer and is determined to prove her husbands innocence. As she comes closer to the truth, she also comes closer to danger.

programme.title: DAEMUGA: The Great Shaman Song
programme.desc: Sin-nam, Chung-dam, Sung-joon battle their skills to seize the redevelopment district and compete to be the best shaman.

programme.title: 3.5th Period
programme.desc: In Shin-ha High School, there's a secret hidden between the 3rd and 4th periods. It's the existence of a 3.5th period where time flows ten times slower, turning 10 minutes into 100. Baek Ah-jin accidentally enters the 3.5th period and meets Kang Da-won, a male student trapped there. To help Da-won escape from the 3.5th period, Ah-jin unravels the mysteries hidden there. However, there are those who hinder their efforts and strive to conceal the 3.5th period. What secrets are hidden in Shin-ha High School's 3.5th period? Will Da-won successfully escape and reunite with Ah-jin?

programme.title: I AM HERE (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A hot-blooded investigator vs. an outraged murderer. The extreme chase between two men entangled in cruel fate begins!Seon-du, the police investigator was once stabbed in his lungs while hunting down a murderer but was miraculously brought back to life through an organ transplant. He returned to the front lines of investigation and was tracking down a serial killer Kyu-jong. In the process, he finds out through the donation coordinator Ah-seung that Kyu-jong got an organ transplant from the same donor as himself and that the donor was a murderer he arrested himself in the past...

programme.title: The Fox Family (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A story of a family who are kumiho(nine-tailed) foxes in human form. They are looking for a chance to eat a fresh human liver to be turned back into humans.

programme.title: Ten Months
programme.desc: Mi-rae a twentysomething game engineer finds out that the hangover was actually her body being pregnant.

programme.title: The Stone
programme.desc: A gang boss Nam-hae meets a Go player Min-su. In learning Go from Min-su Nam-hae looks back on his own life.

programme.title: A Day
programme.desc: A world-famous father gets stuck in a loop as he continues to fail to save his daughter only to find that this phenomenon is related to his past.

programme.title: Idol
programme.desc: A car accident triggered everything. The secret is bound to connect two men's lives in a harrowing way.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: In the future, a man with access to people's memories finds his life at risk when he discovers a dark secret.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Tomorrow's Game
programme.desc: On the day of his Uncle's ascendance into the Hall of Fame, Daniel is forced to embark on a journey through time that sees him restore his family's legacy and rewrite baseball history.

programme.title: Bribery and Corruption
programme.desc: (1997) Mystery thriller starring James D'Arcy. When Nicholas's teenage crush is murdered and his father is the number one suspect, unravelling the truth becomes a family affair...

programme.title: Island Of Shadows
programme.desc: (2020) Dark thriller with Anna Hopkins. While staying in a house that once belonged to her family, a true-crime author unravels a sinister truth lurking in the shadows. Family secrets can be deadly...

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: All That Glitters
programme.desc: (2014) Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. Thrifty shopper and amateur sleuth Jennifer sifts through sparkly clues when the owner of a storage unit full of antique items is murdered.

programme.title: Mystery 101: An Education in Murder
programme.desc: Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a young writer reopens an old case, a determined professor races to prove her colleague's innocence - before the truth is buried for good.

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in harsh conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Set in 1903, Tracker is a tense action thriller in which Arjan (Ray Winstone), a guerrilla survivor of the South African Boer War, lands in colonial New Zealand and is promised a huge bounty to capture Kereama (Temuera Morrison), a Maori seafarer accused of killing a British soldier.

programme.title: Supercell
programme.desc: Aspiring storm-chaser William is determined to continue his father's legacy by chasing the most dangerous supercell tornado ever seen.
